category_sources: source_facts.description says Prism is for API mocking and contract testing; official Stoplight page describes Prism as an open-source HTTP mock and proxy server.
display_name_sources: Official Stoplight documentation page title is "Prism CLI"; source_facts.name is prism-cli.
docs_sources: Official Stoplight Prism docs contain a dedicated Prism CLI page; official Stoplight Prism product page links to docs.
repo_sources: Official Stoplight Prism page links to GitHub; GitHub repository stoplightio/prism describes the Prism packages.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions API mocking and contract testing; official GitHub repository topics/README mention CLI, mock server, OpenAPI, Postman collections, and HTTP proxy.
